objective: Map core Microsoft Excel workflows so workers can create/edit spreadsheets, analyze data, and export results safely.
constraints: Be nondestructive: never modify existing real workbooks unless explicitly created during this run
Use a new blank workbook for most exploration
When saving files, save only to a dedicated test folder and use a unique filename prefix like CASCADE_TEST_
Do not enable or run macros; avoid add-ins that can affect the system
Prefer stable UI selectors (ribbon tabs, named controls); avoid OCR unless necessary

workbook_file_ops: open existing test workbook from test folder
charts_visualization: export chart via save as PDF
